log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Vedalken — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:3+3=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:11+-2=9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:19+-2=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 2/3 targets affected.
--- Ogre --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 11 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Vedalken — Bardic Musician.
→ Javelin: [d20:1+6=7 vs AC 14] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Vedalken — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Ogre (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:5+-2=3 vs DC 16] FAIL! 8 psychic damage. HP: 51/59
--- Ogre --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 11 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Vedalken — Bardic Musician.
→ Javelin: [d20:14+6=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Vedalken — Bardic Musician HP: 56/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
